newsSince: No new material company-specific news since June 9. Q1 2026 (revenue +74% to $1.8M, fleet to 28 driverless trucks, $90.2M cash, $37.9M operating loss), the $100M PIPE, and the Roehl Transport autonomous freight launch all predate the window and were in the prior down-move. -2.85% move is noise.

sources.label: Kodiak AI Q1 2026: 74% revenue growth, 28 driverless trucks (FreightWaves)
Kodiak AI Form 8-K Q1 2026 press release (SEC)

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid-stack lens: not humanoid, an indirect real-world-autonomy proxy. Yesterday's verdict already moved it down for cap/crowding/indirectness. Q1, PIPE and Roehl launch all predate Jun 9; no new info in window. -2.9% is noise. Hold at the lowered rank.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Late-2026 driverless long-haul launch; fleet scaling (28 trucks) and new shippers (Roehl)
verdicts.primaryRisk: Deep operating loss ($37.9M/qtr), cash burn, dilution; only an indirect humanoid-stack proxy
verdicts.bull: Real-world autonomy at industrial scale; 74% revenue growth, expanding driverless fleet, fresh $100M PIPE runway.
verdicts.neutral: Useful autonomy proxy but not humanoid; commercialization still early and cash-burning.
verdicts.bear: -45% YTD, $1.2B cap with tiny revenue, $35M FCF loss/qtr; autonomy linkage to humanoid stack is indirect.
